text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm at the cafeteria deciding on what<n>to eat
when...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I notice Eishin Flash staring at all the<n>dishes on
display with a furrowed<n>brow.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
The dish I am partial to here was<n>suddenly
removed from the menu<n>today due to supply
issues...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
This has disrupted my planned food<n>intake and
has left me at a loss for<n>what to do.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Formulating a new menu plan now<n>would carry a
high risk of introducing<n>extended delays to the
rest of my<n>scheduled activities...
choice_data_list: Why not take this chance to try something new?
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Formulating a new menu plan now<n>would carry a
high risk of introducing<n>extended delays to the
rest of my<n>scheduled activities...
choice_data_list: Why not take this chance to try something new?
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.
Guess you'll have to think of something quickly.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps you are correct. I shall use<n>this
opportunity to expand the breadth<n>of my food
selection here.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That way, I will be able to create a<n>sub-plan to
deal with unexpected<n>occurrences like what
happened<n>today.
choice_data_list:
You might discover something unexpectedly
delicious too.

You might discover something unexpectedly
delicious too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. If that is the case, perhaps<n>this change of
plans will be quite<n>beneficial.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After thanking me, Eishin Flash<n>returns to
choosing a dish to eat.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It is as you say. All that remains is for<n>me to
perform a swift reworking of my<n>plan.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I will check my planned nutritional<n>intake for
today and compare it to the<n>menu items that are
currently<n>displayed.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After thanking me, Eishin Flash<n>returns to
choosing a dish to eat.
